title: inventory.session.review
description: Session-scoped wrapper around lifecycle.transition (spec 002) for the Inventory surface. Pre-fills entity_type based on the session kind resolved server-side from session_id. Returns the same response shape as lifecycle.transition with an additional projected_state field reflecting the post-transition presentational state for the ledger.

ResolvedEntityType.description: Resolved server-side from session_id; included in the response so audit correlation is unambiguous.

message.description: Human-readable explanation. MUST NOT include absolute filesystem paths or secrets.

details.description: Optional structured detail. Examples: { allowed_next_states: [...] } for transition.refused; { source_state: 'missing' } for source.unavailable.

Request.description: Request envelope for inventory.session.review. Caller supplies the session id and target canonical state; the server resolves the entity_type and delegates to lifecycle.transition.

next_state.description: Canonical spec 002 session state. The UI sends canonical names (e.g. 'confirmed', 'needs_review', 'rejected'); presentational projection is applied only to responses.

action_label.description: Human-readable label recorded on the audit entry (e.g. 'Confirmed', 'Re-opened review', 'Rejected session').

Response.description: Response envelope for inventory.session.review. Mirrors lifecycle.transition response with projected_state added.

projected_state.description: Presentational projection of new_state for the Inventory ledger (research.md §3).
